calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Zeeba Rent A Van.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:32 am and concluding at 10:10 am.

Plaintiff Jerry Higgins is present represented by Phillip Weltin, Esq., placed under oaht and testifies.
Defendant Zeeba Rent A Van not appearing.

Plaintiff presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

The Court addresses Plaintiff regarding the Statment of Damages.

The Court finds Plaintiff's Statment of Damages and Proof of Service of the Statment of Damages to be sufficent.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Jerry Higgins, and against Defendant Zeeba Rent A Van, as follows:

Damages: $769,211.52
Intrest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $2,193.88

Total Judgment: $771,405.40

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date. (D505)

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-03-2024 Continued To Jul-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Continued To May-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kelvin Lo, Esq. 626-289-8838 Lo & Lo LLP for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Mr. Lo informs the Court there is a communication breakdown with his client.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Lo & Lo LLP, Atty. Kelvin J. Lo's MOTION to be relieved as counsel for Defendant ZEEBA COMPANY, INC. DBA ZEEBA RENT A VAN.

Granted. Moving party to submit a filled-out proposed order on the mandatory judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
